events.message: Plan execution started — Legal Hub (5 tasks, concurrency limit 2)
task-1-team spawned: DB schema + Case Registry API + Matter Dashboard UI (executor-1, reviewer-1, tester-1)
task-1 entered planning stage
executor-1 hit HTTP 529 overload error (first occurrence) — re-spawned on Opus (retry_count: 1)
executor-1 hit HTTP 529 a second time on Opus — systemic overload pattern confirmed. Spawn pause in effect. (retry_count: 2)
executor-1 re-spawned on Opus (attempt 3) — monitoring for further failure. (retry_count: 3)
executor-1 switched from Opus to Sonnet due to persistent 529 overload — re-spawned on Sonnet (attempt 4, retry_count: 4)
task-1 entered implementation stage — plan approved with minor status-list fix. Planning elapsed: ~20 minutes (includes ~16 min of 529 downtime)
task-1 entered review stage — implementation complete in ~9 minutes. reviewer-1 now active.
task-2-team pipeline-spawned in planning-only mode — Case Detail UI (metadata, parties, status, deadlines). Blocked on task-1 approval before implementation.
task-2 entered planning stage (pipeline mode — implementation gated on task-1 approval)
task-1 review FAILED — 2 issues flagged: catch typing and response envelope keys. Looping back to implementation for fixes. Review elapsed: ~38 minutes. retry_count: 5
task-1 COMPLETED — DB schema + Case Registry API + Matter Dashboard UI. Total elapsed: ~69 minutes (includes ~16 min 529 downtime). retry_count: 5
task-1-team shut down — executor-1, reviewer-1, tester-1 all ended
task-2 plan approved — pipeline_mode cleared, implementation stage unlocked. executor-2 proceeding to implement.
task-2 entered implementation stage — planning elapsed: ~38 minutes (ran concurrently during task-1 review + fix cycle)
task-2 entered review stage — implementation complete in ~6 minutes. reviewer-2 now active.
task-3-team pipeline-spawned in planning-only mode — Case Document Repository. Gated on task-2 approval before implementation.
task-3 entered planning stage (pipeline mode — implementation gated on task-2 approval)
task-4-team pipeline-spawned in planning-only mode — Template-based Document Generation. Gated on task-2 approval before implementation.
task-4 entered planning stage (pipeline mode — implementation gated on task-2 approval)
task-2 COMPLETED — Case Detail UI (metadata, parties, status, deadlines). Total elapsed: ~53 minutes. Planning: ~38 min, implementation: ~6 min, review: ~9 min. 0 retries.
task-2-team shut down — executor-2, reviewer-2, tester-2 all ended
task-3 plan approved — pipeline_mode cleared, implementation unlocked. executor-3 proceeding.
task-3 entered implementation stage — planning elapsed: ~7 minutes
task-4 plan approved — pipeline_mode cleared, implementation unlocked. executor-4 proceeding.
task-4 entered implementation stage — planning elapsed: ~7 minutes
task-3 entered review stage — implementation complete in ~5 minutes. reviewer-3 now active.
task-5-team pipeline-spawned in planning-only mode — Grounded Case Chat. Gated on task-3 approval (task-2 already complete) before implementation.
task-5 entered planning stage (pipeline mode — implementation gated on task-3 approval)
task-4 entered review stage — implementation complete in ~12 minutes. reviewer-4 now active.
task-3 review FAILED — 1 issue: CASE_ATTACHMENTS_DIR missing from paths.js. Looping back to implementation. Review elapsed: ~7 minutes. retry_count: 1
task-4 review FAILED — 3 issues: template sanitization, missing logAction in export route, 400→404 for missing template. Looping back to implementation. Review elapsed: ~3 minutes. retry_count: 1
task-3 COMPLETED — Case Document Repository. Total elapsed: ~23 minutes. Planning: ~7 min, implementation: ~16 min (incl. retry fix), review: ~11 min total. retry_count: 1
task-3-team shut down — executor-3, reviewer-3, tester-3 all ended
task-5 plan approved — pipeline_mode cleared, implementation unlocked. executor-5 proceeding.
task-5 entered implementation stage — planning elapsed: ~4 minutes
task-5 entered review stage — implementation complete in ~3 minutes. reviewer-5 now active.
task-5 review FAILED — 1 issue: JSON body parse error handling missing inner try-catch for 400 on malformed JSON. Looping back to implementation. Review elapsed: ~2 minutes. retry_count: 1
task-5 COMPLETED — Grounded Case Chat. Total elapsed: ~12 minutes. Planning: ~4 min, implementation: ~7 min (incl. retry fix), review: ~4 min total. retry_count: 1
task-5-team shut down — executor-5, reviewer-5, tester-5 all ended
task-4 COMPLETED — Template-based Document Generation. Total elapsed: ~31 minutes. Planning: ~7 min, implementation: ~24 min (incl. retry fix), review: ~12 min total. retry_count: 1
task-4-team shut down — executor-4, reviewer-4, tester-4 all ended
All 5 tasks completed. Total wall-clock: ~108 minutes. Effective work time: ~92 minutes. Operational report written.
